calendar.matters:
Petition And Declaration Of Amber Chase To Declare Trust Titled Property As Asset Of Probate Estate
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Barry Schneider for and with Amber Chase.

Mr. Schneider stated that the Lawyer who drafted the Trust no longer practices in California, that the Attorney moved to Kansas, that the number with the BAR is not working, that they did a google search, that they could not find Edmond Brown or Mattie Mullens (Witnesses) and that the First Alternate Executor had no idea where these other people were. The Court informed Counsel that it prefers to proceed in a Trust, and that he should file a petition to have a Trustee appointed and for instructions to distribute the Trust. The Petition to Declare Trust Titled Property as Asset of Probate Estate and the Petition for Letters of Administration are off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2017 Continued To Jul-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for petitioner Amber Chase

Mr. Schneider reported that efforts to locate the trust document have been unsuccessful. He stated that the attorney who created the trust documents has retired and could not be reached, and the witness to the will is deceased. The Court responded that he wanted a further effort made to locate the former attorney. The matter was continued to July 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
